title: Bridge Essay: Allostatic-Interoceptive Overload in Frontotemporal Dementia.
concept: Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Body-energy** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Interoception — visceral perception, cardiac interoception, insula, vagal signaling, felt aliveness.

**Allostatic-Interoceptive Overload in Frontotemporal Dementia.** - Biol Psychiatry (2022). DOI: 10.1016/j.biopsych.2022.02.955. PMID: 35491275. BACKGROUND: The predictive coding theory of allostatic-interoceptive load states that brain networks mediating autonomic regulation and interoceptive-exteroceptive balance regulate the internal milieu to anticipate future needs and environmental demands. These functions seem to be distinctly compromised in behavioral variant frontotemporal dementia (bvFTD), including alterations of the allostatic-interoceptive network (AIN). Here, we hypothesize that bvFTD is typified by an allostatic-interocept
